Talked about it on the pod but this early offense set from the Liberty is getting predictable. 

-Empty corner, guard/guard screen which does get two but the Sky pre-rotate
-Swing to the top and because of the spacing it's Jonquel/Stewie in action together.

items.title: Breaking: Dallas Wings star Paige Bueckers will be AVAILABLE to play tonight as the Wings take on the Portland Fire in their final game before the All-Star break, a source tells ESPN. Bueckers missed the last game due to soreness following a mid-game collision on Sunday.
items.author: Alexa Philippou
items.body_excerpt: Breaking: Dallas Wings star Paige Bueckers will be AVAILABLE to play tonight as the Wings take on the Portland Fire in their final game before the All-Star break, a source tells ESPN. Bueckers missed the last game due to soreness following a mid-game collision on Sunday.

items.title: The Fire announced that Sania Feagin underwent successful left ACL surgery. She’s out for the season but will remain with the team and work with their medical staff for her rehab. She had signed a development deal but never appeared in a game for the Fire before the injury.
items.author: Sean Highkin
items.body_excerpt: The Fire announced that Sania Feagin underwent successful left ACL surgery. She’s out for the season but will remain with the team and work with their medical staff for her rehab. She had signed a development deal but never appeared in a game for the Fire before the injury.
